top3.sql:
SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    (CAST(d.A15 AS REAL) - CAST(d.A14 AS REAL)) / CAST(d.A14 AS REAL) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM 
    district d
JOIN 
    account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    l.status IN ('B', 'D')  -- Assuming 'B' and 'D' represent running loans in debt based on typical Bank data conventions
    AND d.A14 IS NOT NULL 
    AND d.A15 IS NOT NULL
    AND d.A14 != 0;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ROUND((d.A16 - d.A15) * 100.0 / d.A15, 2) AS unemployment_rate_increment_1995_to_1996
FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE l.status = 'B'  -- Assuming 'B' means the loan is still running and client is in debt
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.A2, d.A3, d.A15, d.A16;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    (CAST(d.A15 AS REAL) - CAST(d.A14 AS REAL)) / CAST(d.A14 AS REAL) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM 
    district d
JOIN 
    account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    l.status IN ('B', 'D')  -- Assuming 'B' and 'D' represent running loans in debt based on typical Bank data conventions
    AND d.A14 IS NOT NULL 
    AND d.A15 IS NOT NULL
    AND d.A14 != 0;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ROUND((CAST(d.A15 AS REAL) - CAST(d.A14 AS REAL)) / CAST(d.A14 AS REAL) * 100, 2) AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM 
    district d
INNER JOIN 
    account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
INNER JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'
    AND d.A14 > 0 
    AND d.A14 IS NOT NULL 
    AND d.A15 IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ROUND((d.A16 - d.A15) * 100.0 / d.A15, 2) AS unemployment_rate_increment_1995_to_1996
FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE l.status = 'B'  -- Assuming 'B' means the loan is still running and client is in debt
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.A2, d.A3, d.A15, d.A16;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    (CAST(d.A15 AS REAL) - CAST(d.A14 AS REAL)) / CAST(d.A14 AS REAL) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM 
    district d
JOIN 
    account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    l.status IN ('B', 'D')  -- Assuming 'B' and 'D' represent running loans in debt based on typical Bank data conventions
    AND d.A14 IS NOT NULL 
    AND d.A15 IS NOT NULL
    AND d.A14 != 0;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ROUND((CAST(d.A15 AS REAL) - CAST(d.A14 AS REAL)) / CAST(d.A14 AS REAL) * 100, 2) AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM 
    district d
INNER JOIN 
    account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
INNER JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'
    AND d.A14 > 0 
    AND d.A14 IS NOT NULL 
    AND d.A15 IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ROUND((d.A16 - d.A15) * 100.0 / d.A15, 2) AS unemployment_rate_increment_1995_to_1996
FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE l.status = 'B'  -- Assuming 'B' means the loan is still running and client is in debt
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.A2, d.A3, d.A15, d.A16;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    (CAST(d.A15 AS REAL) - CAST(d.A14 AS REAL)) / CAST(d.A14 AS REAL) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM 
    district d
JOIN 
    account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    l.status IN ('B', 'D')  -- Assuming 'B' and 'D' represent running loans in debt based on typical Bank data conventions
    AND d.A14 IS NOT NULL 
    AND d.A15 IS NOT NULL
    AND d.A14 != 0;
